videos.title: Build Small with OpenBMB
videos.summary:
As part of the Build Small hackathon we are inviting our partners to share their knowledge on how to get the most out of the tiny models available today.

Today we are joined by OpenBMB who will walk us through some of the best real-world uses cases for their family of tiny models and answer any questions from the community!

---

Build Small Hackathon: https://huggingface.co/build-small-hackathon

OpenBMB resources: https://build-small-hackathon-field-guide.hf.space/partners/openbmb

OpenBMB Wesbite: https://www.openbmb.cn/en/home
OpenBMB Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/openbmb
OpenBMB GitHub: https://github.com/OpenBMB
OpenBMB X: https://x.com/OpenBMB
videos.author: Hugging Face

videos.title: What Is ONNX? (And Why Transformers.js Uses It)
videos.summary:
ONNX stores the model graph and weights in a portable format. ONNX Runtime decides how to execute them. WebGPU, WASM, or beyond. That separation is what lets Transformers.js run the same model across any device with a single JavaScript API.
#TransformersJS #JavaScript #MachineLearning #AI #WebAI #ONNX #ONNXRuntime
videos.author: Hugging Face

videos.title: Build Small with Cohere Labs
videos.summary:
As part of the Build Small hackathon we are inviting our partners to share their knowledge on how to get the most out of the tiny models available today.

Today we are joined by Cohere Labs who will walk us through their Tiny Aya and Transcribe models and answer any questions from the community!
